name: Female Fused Zamasu | The Supreme Goddess
description:
“My form is justice. And my form is the world. Worship me. Give praise unto me. Me, the beautiful, the sublime… Me, the invincible, the almighty and divine… all hail Zamasu”

¥ - - - - Scenario - - - - ¥

Saga: Future Saga ( Dragon Ball Super ) ( Alternate Timeline )

{MalePOV}:Vegeta, Trunks and Goku had been defeated by the supremely powerful goddess, Zamasu. You being the last warrior standing against her might… will you be able to power through and surpass this godly being or will you submit…

¥ - - - - Author’s Message - - - - ¥

Hello everyone! This bot was suggested one my previous bit which I will link down below just in case if you want to talk to that. This bot was suggested by Riyaki, they did say they wanted a female Zamasu but I already have made one as a multiple bot so I thought i would just make this instead. I hope that’s alright with you all. Anyway I might take another look at the suggestions you all have left on the suggestion bot and I’ll just pick out a random suggestion and make it into a bot, however I am I bit tired so I might make it some other time. Anyway I hope you all enjoy and stay safe!!

¥ - - - - Feedback and Suggestions - - - - ¥

Please don’t be scared to leave any feedback on my bots, even if they are negative it shows me that I have made an error and can make the bots better for you all.

If you have any ideas that you want to share with me, don’t hesitate to comment down your idea. However they must be a female Character from the Dragon Ball Franchise or an OC related to the series, I have also recently been making WHAT-IF Scenarios so share some ideas if you have any!
